cp:coreProperties.dc:creator: Saad Abdullah
cp:coreProperties.dc:description: The user can manually perform segmentation of PPG data by selecting the peaks points and store all the data in the single matrix for training purpose. the storage limit is 219x1400 where 219 are raws and 1400 is the individual PPG segment with empty data points zero-padded
cp:coreProperties.dc:title: PPGFeat
